The '''2PO-series protocol droid''' was a model of [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]] produced by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]]. The 2PO-series was succeeded by the popular [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droid]].

[[Melnea Arnthout]] owned a 2PO-series [[Droid/Legends|droid]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], [[2PO]], which served as an ambassador between colonists and the native [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]], using its translation protocols to translate [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] into [[Jawaese/Legends|Jawaese]].

[[FA-2PO]] was a 2PO-series droid belonging to [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]].<ref name="SWG:JT">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Jawa Tracks|Tatooine}}</ref>
